top_repos.description: Understand Object-Oriented Programming in Python with real-world examples, projects, and tasks. From classes and objects to inheritance and abstraction — all core concepts are covered.

top_repos.name: Tumor-Detection-Model-Using-YOLOV11-And-SAM2
top_repos.description: A cutting-edge deep learning project that combines YOLOv11 (for real-time object detection) with SAM2 (Segment Anything Model) to accurately detect and segment tumors in medical images. Designed for high precision in healthcare diagnostics and research applications.

top_repos.name: Customer-Support-Voice-Agent
top_repos.description: Production-ready AI Voice Agent simulating HVAC customer support. Real-time STT → LLM → TTS pipeline using Groq (Llama 3.3) and Deepgram with WebSockets, tool calling, barge-in support, and a live Mission Control dashboard. Built with FastAPI, SQLite, and zero-cost infrastructure.
